title: Define trusted-owner blast-radius policy
goal: Define and enforce a blast-radius policy for trusted-owner captain-run autonomy so reversibility alone cannot release high-impact execution.

acceptance.assertion: Captain actions declare bounded blast-radius fields for affected repo, branch, PR, runtime, host, fleet or cleanup target.
trusted_owner_mode requires a passing blast-radius policy gate in addition to reversible risk records.
Ambiguous, wildcard or unbounded blast-radius records fail closed and require manual authorization.
Tests cover bounded PR merge, ambiguous scope, wildcard scope and manual fallback.

metadata.source: Grabowski captain-run PR #104/#106 reviews and follow-up triage
metadata.reason: PR #102 trusted-owner autonomy still relied mostly on action-declared reversibility.
